name: Studio Golf
about: Studio Golf is an indoor/outdoor training facility in Wilton, CT, focused on golf lessons, practice, and simulator play. Founded in 1999 by PGA Professional Angelo Lopiano, a Top 100 Instructor, the center offers a mix of traditional coaching and Trackman IO simulator technology. The venue provides memberships, individual lessons, clinics, and access to on-course playing sessions. With a staff of experienced instructors, the facility caters to golfers of all ages and skill levels, offering both short-term and annual membership options.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman IO simulator technology
Customizable lesson packages from Top 100 PGA instructors
Flexible membership options with key access for off-hours practice
On-course playing lessons with instructor-led guidance
Junior-specific programs and equipment fitting services

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food services on-site; BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor with ball and club tracking, available starting Jan 15, 2026

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility also offers club rentals and is a PXG and US Kids Golf fitting center with available clubs and fittings starting Jan 15, 2026.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned on-site, and no policies are specified regarding outside food or drinks, so it's unclear if BYOB is permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Golfers must allow for an hour of time per person to play 18 holes, so a foursome can take up to 4 hours to complete a round on the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Studio Golf offers specific junior programs including PeeWee lessons for ages 3-7 and US Kids Golf equipment, making it suitable for young golfers.
